other_observers: My Grandpa, Earl Wild. A back yard birder, but he occasionally goes with me to try to see other birds.; Cheyenne Laczek-Johnson and Nina Hill found the bird on the morning of April 10.  The bird was seen every day for 5 more days.  A few others that saw the bird were Glenn Walbeck, Bill Schmoker, Joe Roller, Henry Armknecht and Eric Defonso
specific_location: Get off at the Red Lion Exit and follow that road until you reach CR 64.5. Then turn west for about 1 mile and the pond is on the south side of road.
description: It was an all white bird with red legs, face, and bill. The bill was half red, closer to the face, and half black, farther from the face.Behaviors: It was in a shallow pond. It was probing in the pond trying to find food.Call: Didn't hear itPlumage: Adult
